title: Add runtime resource provisioning for worktree agents
description: Add explicit local runtime resource support for worktrees: configured local files/secrets copied or symlinked, bootstrap commands, shared dev server descriptors, per-worktree port allocation, and runtime context injected into child prompts/env. Default should not expose secrets without config/confirmation.
acceptance_criteria: .tick/pi-runner.yaml can declare local_files, secrets_mode, bootstrap commands, and dev_servers; copied secrets are chmod 600 and cleaned up; child prompt lists available runtime resources and tells agents not to start duplicate shared servers.
closed_reason: Added runtime resource provisioning from pi-runner config: local file copy/symlink with chmod 600 for copies, bootstrap commands in worktree, dev server/resource prompt context, and runtime env injection. Secrets default to none.
